testcase.name: test_upload_sticker_succeeds_and_records_kind

failure.message: AssertionError: missing/wrong kind in response: {'id': '19980fa7-ff00-4e00-84b5-b42b23f62fdb', 'server_id': '3e939efb-4606-4b2c-bfb2-47290ba683ce', 'name': 'st_af4cac0c', 'uploader_id': '16a1ad69-98d1-453b-99da-d918a252f400', 'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:12.819666+00:00'} assert None == 'sticker' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def469bee80>('kind') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def469bee80> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:12.819666+00:00', 'id': '19980fa7-ff00-4e00-84b5-b42b23f62fdb', 'name': 'st_af4cac0c', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:153: in test_upload_sticker_succeeds_and_records_kind assert e.get("kind") == "sticker", f"missing/wrong kind in response: {e}" E AssertionError: missing/wrong kind in response: {'id': '19980fa7-ff00-4e00-84b5-b42b23f62fdb', 'server_id': '3e939efb-4606-4b2c-bfb2-47290ba683ce', 'name': 'st_af4cac0c', 'uploader_id': '16a1ad69-98d1-453b-99da-d918a252f400', 'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:12.819666+00:00'} E assert None == 'sticker' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def469bee80>('kind') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def469bee80> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:12.819666+00:00', 'id': '19980fa7-ff00-4e00-84b5-b42b23f62fdb', 'name': 'st_af4cac0c', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_upload_emoji_kind_succeeds_and_records_kind

failure.message: AssertionError: missing/wrong kind in response: {'id': '2295be31-0e58-4699-a73a-fac2bd4ef0df', 'server_id': 'a4e7d270-f669-4fd5-9250-1fce6b541eb7', 'name': 'em_12eb7ad8', 'uploader_id': 'e79c41c5-1c24-4fbc-bd81-a926a655ffee', 'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:15.788769+00:00'} assert None == 'emoji' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def4686e4c0>('kind') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def4686e4c0> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:15.788769+00:00', 'id': '2295be31-0e58-4699-a73a-fac2bd4ef0df', 'name': 'em_12eb7ad8', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:162: in test_upload_emoji_kind_succeeds_and_records_kind assert e.get("kind") == "emoji", f"missing/wrong kind in response: {e}" E AssertionError: missing/wrong kind in response: {'id': '2295be31-0e58-4699-a73a-fac2bd4ef0df', 'server_id': 'a4e7d270-f669-4fd5-9250-1fce6b541eb7', 'name': 'em_12eb7ad8', 'uploader_id': 'e79c41c5-1c24-4fbc-bd81-a926a655ffee', 'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:15.788769+00:00'} E assert None == 'emoji' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def4686e4c0>('kind') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def4686e4c0> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:15.788769+00:00', 'id': '2295be31-0e58-4699-a73a-fac2bd4ef0df', 'name': 'em_12eb7ad8', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_upload_invalid_kind_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:169: in test_upload_invalid_kind_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"expected 400 for kind=invalid, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 400 for kind=invalid, got 200: {"emoji":{"id":"11b63b31-76ff-4eaa-83c4-836dc3f7cfb2","server_id":"d198bcb6-4d13-47a4-bf25-ce8c673f18ad","name":"bad_8b8067cf","uploader_id":"50afc2ee-bf86-44c7-95c7-cbd5fb98aa49","content_type":"image/png","created_at":"2026-05-01T17:57:17.296032+00:00"}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sticker_900kb_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:197: in test_sticker_900kb_succeeds assert r.status_code in (200, 201), \ E AssertionError: 900KB sticker rejected (status 400); kind=sticker should allow up to 1MB: {"detail":"Emoji must be under 512KB"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_server_emojis_includes_kind

failure.message: AssertionError: {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:26.129856+00:00', 'id': 'bc9279ad-f01d-4262-b0e0-a13e65f19b21', 'name': 'alpha_em', ...} assert None == 'emoji' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46a61a00>('kind') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46a61a00> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:26.129856+00:00', 'id': 'bc9279ad-f01d-4262-b0e0-a13e65f19b21', 'name': 'alpha_em', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:211: in test_list_server_emojis_includes_kind assert by_name["alpha_em"].get("kind") == "emoji", by_name["alpha_em"] E AssertionError: {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:26.129856+00:00', 'id': 'bc9279ad-f01d-4262-b0e0-a13e65f19b21', 'name': 'alpha_em', ...} E assert None == 'emoji' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46a61a00>('kind') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46a61a00> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:26.129856+00:00', 'id': 'bc9279ad-f01d-4262-b0e0-a13e65f19b21', 'name': 'alpha_em', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_list_my_emojis_includes_kind

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'emoji' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46893880>('kind') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46893880> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:27.946326+00:00', 'id': 'cdd2790c-c45f-4603-b086-c5d6b174e050', 'name': 'mine_em', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4_leonty.py:224: in test_list_my_emojis_includes_kind assert by_name["mine_em"].get("kind") == "emoji" E AssertionError: assert None == 'emoji' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46893880>('kind') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7def46893880> = {'content_type': 'image/png', 'created_at': '2026-05-01T17:57:27.946326+00:00', 'id': 'cdd2790c-c45f-4603-b086-c5d6b174e050', 'name': 'mine_em', ...}.get
